alert.reason: Server DEGRADED (7/14 sessions) | CPU critical (71.5%) | High latency clients: cli_uyx7ov0p

agent_results.alert_reason: Server DEGRADED (15/14 sessions) | Server CRITICAL — rejecting new connections | High latency clients: cli_uyx7ov0p, sim_1773035138265_0, sim_1773035138265_1
agent_results.root_cause: Server at 100% capacity (15/15 sessions). New connections are being REJECTED. Service is unavailable for new users.
agent_results.immediate_action: Scale horizontally immediately. Enable request queuing. Review session TTL and evict idle sessions.
preventive_measures: Implement session TTL to auto-evict idle connections.
Configure connection pooling and reuse.
Set up horizontal scaling triggers at 70% capacity.
Add a load balancer to distribute sessions across multiple instances.

agent_results.alert_reason: CPU critical (93.5%) | Bandwidth spike (9765 KB/s) | High latency clients: cli_uyx7ov0p
agent_results.root_cause: CPU at 93.5%. Heavy compute or bulk processing tasks are saturating the processor.
agent_results.immediate_action: Throttle compute-intensive tasks. Queue bulk_process and compute jobs. Check for runaway threads.
preventive_measures: Implement task queuing for heavy compute jobs.
Add CPU usage limits per client session.
Offload compute tasks to a background worker process.
Profile the most CPU-intensive tasks and optimize them.

agent_results.alert_reason: CPU critical (92.0%) | High latency clients: cli_uyx7ov0p
agent_results.root_cause: 1 client (cli_uyx7ov0p) experiencing high latency. Likely isolated — heavy task or degraded network.
agent_results.immediate_action: Monitor the specific client. If persistent, ask client to retry with lighter tasks.
preventive_measures: Set server-side timeout limits per task type.
Add latency-based session prioritization (deprioritize high-latency clients).
Profile task execution times and set SLO budgets.
Implement heartbeat timeouts to detect and evict stale sessions.

executed_actions.description: Enabled strict queue mode for new connections
executed_actions.result: Queue mode enabled. New sessions limited to high-priority only.

executed_actions.description: Degraded sessions put in low-priority mode
Latency watchdog reset — monitoring response times
executed_actions.result: Alert condition resolved. System returning to normal.

final_diagnosis.immediate_action: Scale horizontally immediately. Enable request queuing. Review session TTL and evict idle sessions.
preventive_measures: Implement session TTL to auto-evict idle connections.
Configure connection pooling and reuse.
Set up horizontal scaling triggers at 70% capacity.
Add a load balancer to distribute sessions across multiple instances.
Implement task queuing for heavy compute jobs.
Add CPU usage limits per client session.
Offload compute tasks to a background worker process.
Profile the most CPU-intensive tasks and optimize them.
Set server-side timeout limits per task type.
Add latency-based session prioritization (deprioritize high-latency clients).
Profile task execution times and set SLO budgets.
Implement heartbeat timeouts to detect and evict stale sessions.
